entity.name: AppSale

boolean.name: manageSaleOrderVersion
boolean.title: Manage sale order versions
boolean.help: This option enables the ability to create multiple versions of a quotation, allowing modification of a quotation to create a new version. Each version is stored as a PDF in the document management system. If you wish to recover a past quotation version, you must also enable the option Activate past versions recovery.

boolean.name: printingOnSOFinalization
boolean.title: Generate the pdf printing during sale order finalization
boolean.help: If this option is enabled, when the quotation moves to finalized status, a PDF copy of the quotation is automatically saved in the document management system.

boolean.name: isPastVersionRecovery
boolean.title: Activate past versions recovery
boolean.help: This option automatically saves each quotation version and allows recovering them at any time if you wish to revert to a previous version, by selecting the quotation lines you want to recover.

boolean.name: manageSalesUnits
boolean.title: Manage sales unit on products
boolean.help: This function is useful when the units of purchase of a product from a supplier are different from your sales units (for example if you buy a product by the ton and resell it by the kilo). When creating a customer order, the selected product will be directly shown with its sales unit, avoiding manual conversions.

boolean.name: enableConfigurator
boolean.title: Enable business configurator
boolean.help: Enables business configurators, accessible from the Configurations menu in the Sales module. Once configured, the configurator allows creating a custom product during quotation with guided options, specific characteristics, adaptive pricing, etc.

boolean.name: allowPendingOrderModification
boolean.help: This option allows modification of a confirmed order. When an order is being modified, invoice and delivery note generation is blocked. If a delivery note is in planned status, it will remain blocked at that status as long as the order is being modified.

boolean.name: manageMultipleSaleQuantity
boolean.title: Manage multiple sale quantity
boolean.help: This option allows defining multiple sale quantities on a product. You can specify that a product can only be sold in certain multiples (for example quantities of 5/10/15 if the multiple is 5). If the quantity selected on an order line differs, the line cannot be validated and a message will indicate the allowed quantities.

boolean.name: printingConfigPerSaleOrder
boolean.title: Printing config per Sale Order
boolean.help: If this option is not enabled, the default printing settings for quotations/orders will be those of the company. By enabling this option, you can configure specific printing settings per quotation/order.

boolean.name: closeOpportunityUponSaleOrderConfirmation
boolean.title: Close opportunity when one of the linked sale orders is confirmed
boolean.help: When an order is linked to an opportunity, enabling this option will automatically move the opportunity to closed won status when the order is confirmed.

boolean.name: isEnabledProductDescriptionCopy
boolean.title: Enable product description copy
boolean.help: Allows displaying on quotation lines the product description (description field from the product form).

integer.name: salespersonSelect
integer.title: User to fill salesperson
integer.help: When creating a quotation, allows choosing whether it is automatically assigned to the active/connected user creating the quotation, or to the salesperson responsible for the customer.

boolean.name: enableCustomerCatalogMgt
boolean.title: Enable customer catalog management
boolean.help: Enables the ability to manage customer catalogs, meaning the ability to indicate that certain products have different names for certain customers (different product name and/or code).

boolean.name: enablePackManagement
boolean.title: Pack Management
boolean.help: This option enables the ability to manage product packs. A pack groups products/services that are sold together. Once a pack is selected on a quotation, all products composing the pack are added to the quotation.

boolean.name: isDisplaySaleOrderLineNumber
boolean.title: Display sale order line number
boolean.help: Allows assigning a number to quotation/order lines and displaying it on the quotation.

boolean.name: enableSalesProductByTradName
boolean.title: Filter products by trading name
boolean.help: If this option is enabled, a panel allowing to sell this product by trading name appears on product forms. This allows defining which products trading names can sell, and filtering only sellable products by trading name on quotations.

many-to-one.name: saleUnit
many-to-one.title: Default unit
many-to-one.help: This is the default sales unit for a product when it is created.

boolean.name: managePartnerComplementaryProduct
boolean.title: Manage partner complementary product
boolean.help: Allows defining on a customer that specifically for this customer, if a certain product is sold, complementary products are either automatically added to the quotation or proposed as options. This configuration complements the standard complementary product management defined at the product level, which applies to all partners.

boolean.name: isEnableCalculationEntireQuotation
boolean.title: Enable calculation of the entire quotation's prices
boolean.help: This configuration enables you to recalculate line prices using a quotation. The recalculation will take into account pricing, if any, then the partner price lists.

boolean.name: considerZeroCost
boolean.title: Consider zero cost and zero price lines in the margin
boolean.help: When activated, the total margin of a sale order will take into account sale order lines where the cost price or the sale price is zero.

boolean.name: isDiscountEnabledOnEditableGrid
boolean.title: Enable discount on editable lines
boolean.help: If you have set a line display type to editable or editable tree, you can manage discounts directly from the editable line list without having to open the line in a popup.

boolean.name: isCartManagementEnabled
boolean.title: Enable cart management
boolean.help: Enabling this configuration allows the user to put products aside in a cart to generate an order at a later date.

integer.name: listDisplayTypeSelect
integer.title: Line list display type
integer.help: Standard: Display the classic order line list. Editable: This configuration enables an editable list on quotation/order lines, allowing quick addition and completion of lines from the list view. Editable tree: Activate multi-level customer order lines.

boolean.name: isSOLPriceTotalOfSubLines
boolean.help: When enabled, sale order lines price will be computed based on their sub lines.

boolean.name: isGlobalDiscountEnabledOnSaleOrder
boolean.title: Enable global discount on sale order
boolean.help: Allow the user to apply a global discount on a sale order. Global discount and discount per line are not cumulative.

boolean.name: enableConfiguratorEdition
boolean.title: Enable edition of configurators
boolean.help: Allow to edit configurator values inside the generated sale order line. Product will then be modified and line regenerated.

boolean.name: enableLineDuplication
boolean.title: Enable line duplication
boolean.help: Allow the duplication of sale quotation line. The line will be recomputed from its configurator if possible.

boolean.name: isQuotationAndOrderSplitEnabled
boolean.title: Split quotations and orders
boolean.help: When enabled, confirming a sale quotation will generate a new sale order. This configuration allow the partial validation of a sale quotation.
